title: We count on you | Stats NZ
content:
07 September 2017, 10:45am

### Because data can help build stronger communities
These downloadable brochures give a snapshot of data about the different regions of Aotearoa New Zealand.
Every number tells a story, and yours matters. The "We Count on You" infographic brochures showcase snapshots of life across New Zealand’s regions, from population growth and iwi affiliations to economic activity and languages spoken. These insights are only possible thanks to the people who take part in Stats NZ surveys.
By participating in our surveys, you help create a clearer picture of your community’s needs, strengths, and opportunities. This data empowers local leaders, charities, iwi, businesses, and organisations to make informed decisions that improve services, support wellbeing, and plan for the future.
Explore your region’s story and see how your contribution helps shape a better Aotearoa New Zealand.
